welcome.title: Welcome!

login.title: Let's get started
login.subtitle: Create your account so we can save your profile and progress.
login.privacy: We respect your data. We never share your information without consent.

focus.title: Where do you need help?
focus.subtitle: Pick what matters to you now. You can change this anytime.

allergies.subtitle: Tick what you know. We'll highlight allergens in recipes.
allergies.optional: You can skip this step if you're not sure.
